CASE NOTES — E2E TEST DOCUMENT
Matter: Smith v. Jones | Test Case
Date: 2025-01-15

TIMELINE OF EVENTS

January 10, 2025
Initial incident occurred at 123 Main Street. John Smith reported property damage totaling $5,000. Police report filed (Case #12345).

January 12, 2025
Jane Jones responded via email denying responsibility. Email preserved as evidence.

January 15, 2025
Attorney consultation completed. Advised to file in small claims court given the $5,000 amount.

EVIDENCE ON FILE
- Police report #12345 (January 10, 2025)
- Email from Jane Jones (January 12, 2025)
- Photographs of damaged property (4 images)
- Repair estimate from contractor: $5,200

FINANCIAL SUMMARY
Property damage repair: $5,200
Filing fee: $150
Total claimed: $5,350

NEXT STEPS
1. File small claims petition before February 15, 2025 deadline
2. Serve Jane Jones at her last known address
3. Gather witness statements from neighbors
